meaning: n.平底锅,盘子,面板 Pan <希神>潘(半人半羊的山林和畜牧之神)
examples: Oh hell, I've burned the pan.
She cracked an egg into the pan.
She put a pan of water on the stove.
These campaigns have yet to pan out into the full bonanzas the U.N. hopes for.
Reeling over an eternity of dunes I reach a second pan known locally as Deadvlei.
